title: Add canonical MeshCore incoming app-event frame vectors
description: Why this exists: the MeshCore incoming text/status event frames added for app compatibility are now asserted in Zephyr ztests but do not yet have canonical JSON vectors under test/vectors/. What needs to be done: add machine-readable vectors for MSG_WAITING, CHANNEL_MSG_RECV_V3 text, PUSH_SEND_CONFIRMED status, and NO_MORE_MESSAGES sync behavior, then wire at least one no-hardware test/harness to consume them or document why the Zephyr ztests are the canonical consumer.
acceptance_criteria: test/vectors/ contains MeshCore incoming app-event vectors; no-hardware tests or documented harness validation consume or cross-check them; vector semantics match the adapter ztests.
close_reason: Completed: MeshCore app-compat vectors added under test/vectors/meshcore_app_compat.json, schema/generator/Python validation updated, and Zephyr meshcore_adapter consumes the deterministic adapter subset from generated JSON fixtures. Incoming MSG_WAITING, CHANNEL_MSG_RECV_V3, PUSH_SEND_CONFIRMED, and NO_MORE_MESSAGES vectors included.
